text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 
23 
DED_APPLY 
LABEL: 
How Part D Deductible is Applied 
DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates whether the plan charges the Medicare-defined Part D deductible amount. 
SHORT NAME: — 
LONG NAME: DED_APPLY 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
CMS (HPMS Files) 
VALUES: 
1 = Medicare-Defined Amount 

2 = Plan-Defined Amount 

3 = No Deductible 

COMMENT: 
The CCW constructs the Plan
